description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image and defines a deploy stage with a pages job. The pages job runs only on the master branch, executes the commands: rustup install stable, cargo +stable check, cargo +nightly check, ./test.sh, cargo doc, and cp -r target/doc public. It publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or variables are needed.
